# CWE-303 — Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-303-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"crypto/subtle"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: constant-time MAC comparison per HMAC verification guidance.
func VerifyWebhook(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sigHex := r.Header.Get("X-Signature")
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte("secret"))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	provided, err := hex.DecodeString(sigHex)
	if err != nil || subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(expected, provided) != 1 {
		http.Error(w, "bad sig", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
